details.test: Task 1: Register for two virtual internship workshops next week (>= 12:00 PM)
Task 2: Build schedule with three events in current term (workshops + career fair)
Task 3: Choose event with more open spots this month and register
Task 4: Bookmark in-person STEM career fair within next 30 days and add to calendar/schedule
Task 5: Book earliest resume review appointment next week between 9:00 and 12:00
Task 6: Save three events for this semester (workshops and career fair)
Task 7: Register for highest-rated virtual event (practice interview analog)
Task 8: Register for two weekday afternoon/evening events for student audiences
Task 9: Create and prioritize visit list for tech-focused career fair
